steps.title: Translate the percentage statement to an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 5% of $w$ is 912.46 means we multiply $w$ by the decimal equivalent of 5%.
$$0.05w = 912.46$$

steps.title: Solve for w by dividing
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.05:
$$w = \frac{912.46}{0.05}$$
To divide by 0.05, multiply by its reciprocal, 20:
$$w = 912.46 \times 20 = 18,249.2$$
That matches Choice C — 18,249.2.
